intro: I'm building toward sharing ideas on stage and in virtual events. Here are topics I'm excited to talk about.
ctaLabel: Interested in having me speak? Let's talk

topics.title: Building in Public
topics.description: Lessons from learning, failing, and shipping — the honest version of the developer journey.

topics.title: Creative Coding
topics.description: Using code as a medium for art, storytelling, and interactive experiences.

topics.title: Career Transitions
topics.description: Navigating the path into software development from a non-traditional background.

topics.title: Developer Tooling & Workflow
topics.description: What makes teams productive and developers happy — tools, habits, and culture.
